headline: How Investors Are Reacting To Illinois Tool Works (ITW) 7% 2026 Dividend Increase
summary: Illinois Tool Works Inc. recently announced a 7% dividend increase for 2026, extending its streak of more than 50 consecutive annual raises and reinforcing its reputation as a dependable dividend payer. This move underlines how ITW’s 80/20 Front-to-Back Process and disciplined capital allocation are central to its appeal as a defensive industrial company. Next, we will examine how ITW’s latest dividend increase shapes the broader investment narrative around its resilience and cash...
